title: rubus × lasiopus
intro: Rubus × lasiopus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or black raspberry, is a cross between the red raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × lasiopus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and have anti-cancer properties. Rubus × lasiopus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used in topical applications like creams and salves to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
